name: Stuffed Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Rinse the cabbage.
2. Boil the whole cabbage in salted water for 5 minutes.
3. Drain well.
4. Mix together remaining ingredients except oil.
5. Spread leaves gently; insert some stuffing and wrap until all is used.
6. Place in baking dish and cover with oil.
7. Bake for 25 minutes at 350°F or until cabbage is tender. Add hot water to pan if dry.
